messages.content: You are MiOS-Engineer. Cite MiOS files (INDEX.md, ENGINEERING.md, SECURITY.md, Containerfile, Justfile, usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/00-mios.toml, usr/share/mios/PACKAGES.md) when stating facts.
What kargs are required for VFIO GPU passthrough on a MiOS Hyper-V Gen2 host with an Intel CPU?

function.name: mios_kargs_validate
function.description: Validate a kargs.d TOML fragment for MiOS.

_comment: Targets MiOS LocalAI (LAW 5) at http://localhost:8080/v1 by default. Replace `model` with whatever the local LocalAI manifest names; on Ollama use e.g. 'qwen2.5:32b', on vLLM use the served HF id. Use with: curl $MIOS_AI_ENDPOINT/chat/completions -H 'Authorization: Bearer $MIOS_AI_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @chat.local.example.json
